user_query: What is Jon offering to the dancers at his dance studio?

node_data.text: Jon is offering one-on-one mentoring and training to help dancers reach their full potential.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Directly states that Jon is offering one-on-one mentoring and training to help dancers.

node_data.text: Jon wants his dance studio to be a place of support and encouragement for all dancers.
